message:
feat(ffs-inode): implement inode lifecycle operations (bd-zge.5)

Read, write, create, delete inodes with CRC32C checksum computation
verified against ffs-ondisk's verifier. Inode serialization roundtrip,
Orlov allocation via ffs-alloc, extent truncation via ffs-extent on
delete. Timestamp helpers (touch_atime/mtime_ctime/ctime). 9 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
